pytorch.reason: Numerical purity cross-check for unitary evolution (Si/Ne)

z3.reason: UNSAT proof: tilted axis H cannot generate Si-type latitude-circle orbits

sympy.reason: Lyapunov derivative dV/dt=-gamma*(1-rho_00) for Se; dW/dt for Ni; orbit-axis symbolic analysis

sympy_dV_dt_formula.claim: dV/dt = -gamma*(1 - rho_00) for Se amplitude damping

sympy_dW_dt_formula.claim: dW/dt = -gamma * rho_00 for Ni amplitude pumping

sympy_fixed_point_dW_zero.claim: dW/dt = 0 at |1><1| (the Ni fixed point, rho_00 = 0)

Si_purity_preserved.claim: Purity invariant under H=sigma_z (Si) for 10 random states

Ne_purity_preserved.claim: Purity invariant under H=sigma_x (Ne) for 10 random states

pytorch_si_purity_crosscheck.claim: Torch Euler cross-check: purity preserved under Si

Se_purity_not_conserved.claim: Purity changes under Se dissipation (not conserved)

Ni_purity_not_conserved.claim: Purity changes under Ni dissipation (not conserved)

numerical_z_oscillates.claim: z-component oscillates under tilted H (great circle, not latitude circle)

numerical_bloch_norm_preserved.claim: Bloch norm (purity) preserved under tilted unitary (confirms unitary type)

N1_no_fifth_orbit_type_z3_UNSAT.z3_claim: Encoding: a>0, b>0 (tilted H), commutator [H,sz]=0 (latitude-circle condition) => UNSAT

N2_entropy_not_monotone_amplitude_dampin.claim: Starting near |0><0| (fixed point), entropy does NOT increase under Se damping. Entropy is not a monotone. The correct statement is purity convergence toward fixed point.
N2_entropy_not_monotone_amplitude_dampin.interpretation: Entropy is not monotone: decreases from maximally mixed, near-zero near fixed point. Purity convergence is the correct invariant.

B1_theta_zero_pure_Si.claim: theta=0: H=sigma_z, z-component preserved (Si-type latitude circles)

B2_theta_pi2_pure_Ne.claim: theta=pi/2: H=sigma_x, z oscillates full range (Ne-type great circles)

B3_theta_pi4_tilted_great_circle.claim: theta=pi/4: tilted H, orbit is great circle. z oscillates (not fixed), Bloch norm preserved.

summary.lyapunov_result: Se: dV/dt = -gamma*(1-rho_00) < 0 for all rho != |0><0|. Ni: dW/dt = -gamma*rho_00 < 0 for all rho != |1><1|. Both fixed points are globally attracting (Lyapunov stable).
summary.entropy_monotonicity_clarification: Von Neumann entropy is NOT monotonically increasing under amplitude damping. Near the pure fixed point entropy is already ~0 and stays ~0. From the maximally mixed state entropy DECREASES (convergence to pure fixed point). The correct invariant is: purity converges to 1 (toward the fixed-point pure state). Unitaries (Si/Ne) preserve purity exactly. Dissipative (Se/Ni) do not.
summary.SiNe_orbit_type_finding: H = cos(theta)*sigma_z + sin(theta)*sigma_x generates a rotation around the tilted axis n=(cos(theta), 0, sin(theta)). Orbits are great circles (Ne-type) for ALL theta != 0. Si-type (latitude circles, z preserved) occurs ONLY at theta=0 exactly. z3 UNSAT: assuming b>0 and [H, sigma_z]=0 is unsatisfiable. Tilted coupling does NOT create a 5th orbit type.
